profile.name: faster-whisper

intro.title: Faster Whisper transcription with CTranslate2
intro.desc: faster-whisper** is a reimplementation of OpenAI's Whisper model using [CTranslate2](https://github.com/OpenNMT/CTranslate2/), which is a fast inference engine for Transformer models.

install_hints: **Note**: The latest versions of `ctranslate2` only support CUDA 12 and cuDNN 9. For CUDA 11 and cuDNN 8, the current workaround is downgrad

detalle.name: faster-whisper
detalle.desc: faster-whisper** is a reimplementation of OpenAI's Whisper model using CTranslate2, which is a fast inference engine for Transformer models.
detalle.choose_if: quieres faster whisper transcription with ctranslate2
detalle.avoid_if: el caso no requiere generación multimedia o ya usas alternativas dedicadas
